name: James Torres
text: I will never forget the time Izzy played Jafar in our school production. They absolutely owned that role — the voice, the mannerisms, everything. The whole audience was cracking up. Izzy had this gift for making every character bigger than life.

name: Marcus Webb
text: Izzy was the best DM I ever played with. They built entire worlds from scratch — maps, lore, NPCs with actual backstories. Our Tuesday night campaigns were the thing I looked forward to every week. They always found a way to surprise us, even when we thought we had the plot figured out.

name: Priya Sharma
text: Working on Interfectorem with Izzy was one of the highlights of my teenage years. They were the creative engine of our whole team — always sketching characters in the margins of their notebook, always pushing us to make the story darker and weirder. When we won at Demo Day, Izzy just looked at all of us and said "obviously." Classic.

name: Jordan Kim
text: I met Izzy at FanimeCon years ago. They were in the most elaborate Jafar cosplay I'd ever seen and I had to ask how they made it. We ended up talking for three hours. Every year after that, finding Izzy was the first thing I looked forward to when I walked through the doors.

name: Ms. Reyes
text: Izzy had a way of asking questions that made the whole class think differently. Not to show off — they were genuinely curious. I remember one afternoon they stayed after class just to keep talking about a documentary we'd watched. That kind of intellectual hunger is rare, and it was entirely Izzy's own.

name: Theo Nakamura
text: Izzy and I ended up as partners for an anthropology project on ritual and community. They brought in this whole angle about fandom and cosplay as modern ritual that completely changed the direction of our paper. Got us an A. I don't think I would have gotten there without them.

name: Canine Companions volunteer
text: I was part of the team at the graduation ceremony when Izzy was matched with Maeve. The moment those two met, Maeve just settled right in and put her head on Izzy's lap like she'd been waiting for exactly that person. It's one of the most beautiful things I've seen in this work.
